heading: International organic research collaboration
label: 5925d International organic research collaboration
text: The Secretary, acting through the Agricultural Research Service (including the National Agricultural Library) and the Economic Research Service, shall facilitate access by research and extension professionals, farmers, and other interested persons in the United States to, and the use by those persons of, organic research conducted outside the United States.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002, and not as part of subtitle H of title XVI of the Food, Agriculture, Conservation, and Trade Act of 1990 which comprises this subchapter.
DefinitionsSecretary means the Secretary of Agriculture, see , set out as a note under .section 7401(1) of Pub. L. 107–171section 3319b of this title
